creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
Fix pkg-plist, enable QT4 by default

--- 2010-03-07-aqbanking.diff begins here ---
diff -ruN aqbanking.orig/Makefile aqbanking/Makefile
--- aqbanking.orig/Makefile	2010-02-05 06:36:52.000000000 -0500
+++ aqbanking/Makefile	2010-03-07 17:06:59.000000000 -0500
@@ -6,50 +6,90 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	aqbanking
-PORTVERSION=	4.1.0
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	4.2.4
 CATEGORIES=	finance
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www2.aquamaniac.de/sites/download/
-DISTFILES=	
download.php\?package=03\&release=37\&file=01\&dummy=aqbanking-${PORTVERSION}.tar.gz
+DISTFILES=	
download.php\?package=03\&release=50\&file=01\&dummy=${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	bsdkaffee@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Online banking interface and financial data framework
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	gwenhywfar.56:${PORTSDIR}/devel/gwenhywfar \
+LIB_DEPENDS=	gwenhywfar.58:${PORTSDIR}/devel/gwenhywfar \
 		gmp.8:${PORTSDIR}/math/libgmp4
 
-OPTIONS=	KTOBLZCHECK	"KtoBlzCheck support"	off
-
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 USE_GETTEXT=	yes
-USE_QT_VER=	3
-QT_NONSTANDARD=	special flags for threading
 MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 
 CFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include ${PTHREAD_CFLAGS}
 CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include ${PTHREAD_CFLAGS}
-CONFIGURE_ENV+=	LIBS="${QTCFGLIBS} ${PTHREAD_LIBS}"
-CONFIGURE_ENV+=	QTDIR="${QT_PREFIX}"
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-frontends="cbanking qbanking"
+LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
+CONFIGURE_ENV+=	CPPFLAGS="${CPPFLAGS}" \
+		LDFLAGS="${LDFLAGS}"
 
 USE_LDCONFIG=	${PREFIX}/lib/aqbanking/plugins/29/bankinfo \
-		${PREFIX}/lib/aqbanking/plugins/29/frontends/qbanking/cfgmodules\
 		${PREFIX}/lib/aqbanking/plugins/29/imexporters \
 		${PREFIX}/lib/aqbanking/plugins/29/providers \
 		${PREFIX}/lib
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+OPTIONS=	KTOBLZCHECK "KtoBlzCheck support" off \
+		QT3 "Build QT3 frontend" off \
+		QT4 "Build QT4 frontend" on
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 # no configure option to disable ktoblzcheck support (yet)
 .if defined(WITH_KTOBLZCHECK) || exists(${LOCALBASE}/lib/libktoblzcheck.so.4)
 LIB_DEPENDS+=	ktoblzcheck.6:${PORTSDIR}/finance/ktoblzcheck
 .endif
 
-post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s|echo aout|echo elf|g" ${WRKSRC}/configure
+.if !defined(WITH_QT3) && !defined(WITH_QT4)
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-frontends=""
+.elif defined(WITH_QT3) && !defined(WITH_QT4)
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-frontends="qbanking"
+.elif !defined(WITH_QT3) && defined(WITH_QT4)
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-frontends="q4banking"
+.endif
+
+.if defined(WITH_QT3)
+USE_QT_VER=	3
+QT_NONSTANDARD=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ENV+=	LIBS="${QTCFGLIBS} ${PTHREAD_LIBS}" \
+		QTDIR="${QT_PREFIX}"
+USE_LDCONFIG+=	
${PREFIX}/lib/aqbanking/plugins/29/frontends/qbanking/cfgmodules
+PLIST_SUB+=	WITH_QT3=""
+.else
+PLIST_SUB+=     WITH_QT3="@comment "
+.endif
+
+.if defined(WITH_QT4)
+#USE_QT_VER=    4
+#QT_COMPONENTS= gui qt3support moc_build uic_build
+QT_NONSTANDARD=	yes
+.include "${PORTSDIR}/Mk/bsd.qt.mk"
+BUILD_DEPENDS+=	moc-qt4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/qt4-moc \
+		uic-qt4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/qt4-uic
+LIB_DEPENDS+=	QtGui.4:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/qt4-gui \
+		Qt3Support.4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/qt4-qt3support
+CONFIGURE_ENV+= LIBS="${QTCFGLIBS} ${PTHREAD_LIBS}" \
+		QTDIR="${QT_PREFIX}"
+USE_LDCONFIG+=	
${PREFIX}/lib/aqbanking/plugins/29/frontends/q4banking/cfgmodules
+PLIST_SUB+=	WITH_QT4=""
+.else
+PLIST_SUB+=     WITH_QT4="@comment "
+.endif
 
 post-install:
+# install dummy files for directories shared between QT3 & QT4 frontends
+.for dir in 	lib/aqbanking/plugins/29/debugger \
+		lib/aqbanking/plugins/29/debugger/aqhbci \
+		lib/aqbanking/plugins/29/frontends \
+		lib/aqbanking/plugins/29/wizards \
+		share/aqbanking/frontends
+			${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/${dir}
+			${TOUCH} ${PREFIX}/${dir}/.keep_me
+.endfor
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
 
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -ruN aqbanking.orig/distinfo aqbanking/distinfo
--- aqbanking.orig/distinfo	2009-06-22 16:19:08.000000000 -0400
+++ aqbanking/distinfo	2010-03-06 19:20:43.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (download.php?package=03&release=37&file=01&dummy=aqbanking-4.1.0.tar.gz) 
= 247089ccffad60baebc35390315e49d2
-SHA256 
(download.php?package=03&release=37&file=01&dummy=aqbanking-4.1.0.tar.gz) = 
b347d22a40a4f60ac5ef49f429b0bb085e26350d3d36900abbbc80023762623a
-SIZE 
(download.php?package=03&release=37&file=01&dummy=aqbanking-4.1.0.tar.gz) = 
3856295
+MD5 (download.php?package=03&release=50&file=01&dummy=aqbanking-4.2.4.tar.gz) 
= 244f5c6e470b55452d9f2cb6c081c137
+SHA256 
(download.php?package=03&release=50&file=01&dummy=aqbanking-4.2.4.tar.gz) = 
e35507a10a635ad0a8d51aebf12e033620e7bd6a40705440f468b952c8d62106
+SIZE 
(download.php?package=03&release=50&file=01&dummy=aqbanking-4.2.4.tar.gz) = 
4383744

Makefile.in aqbanking/files/patch-src-frontends-qbanking-lib-gui-Makefile.in

2009-05-11 16:42:18.000000000 -0400
+++ aqbanking/files/patch-src-frontends-qbanking-lib-gui-Makefile.in	
1969-12-31 19:00:00.000000000 -0500

06:18:10.000000000 -0800
-+++ src/frontends/qbanking/lib/gui/Makefile.in	2008-12-08 
22:07:51.000000000 -0800
-@@ -393,8 +393,9 @@
- with_aqhbci = @with_aqhbci@
- with_qbanking = @with_qbanking@
- INCLUDES = \
-- $(gwenhywfar_includes) $(qt3_includes) -I$(top_builddir)/headers \
-- -I../dialogs -I.. -I$(top_srcdir)/src/libs/aqbanking
-+ -I$(top_builddir)/headers \
-+ -I../dialogs -I.. -I$(top_srcdir)/src/libs/aqbanking \
-+ $(gwenhywfar_includes) $(qt3_includes)
- 
- AM_CPPFLAGS = @visibility_cflags@
- UI_FILES = \
diff -ruN aqbanking.orig/files/patch-src-plugins-backends-aqhbci-ui-qt3-libs-
dialogs-Makefile.in aqbanking/files/patch-src-plugins-backends-aqhbci-ui-qt3-
libs-dialogs-Makefile.in
--- aqbanking.orig/files/patch-src-plugins-backends-aqhbci-ui-qt3-libs-
dialogs-Makefile.in	2009-05-11 16:42:18.000000000 -0400
+++ aqbanking/files/patch-src-plugins-backends-aqhbci-ui-qt3-libs-dialogs-
Makefile.in	1969-12-31 19:00:00.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,16 +0,0 @@
---- src/plugins/backends/aqhbci/ui/qt3/libs/dialogs/Makefile.in.orig	
2008-11-08 06:18:14.000000000 -0800
-+++ src/plugins/backends/aqhbci/ui/qt3/libs/dialogs/Makefile.in	2008-12-08 
23:17:28.000000000 -0800
-@@ -393,10 +393,11 @@
- with_aqhbci = @with_aqhbci@
- with_qbanking = @with_qbanking@
- SUBDIRS = wizard
--INCLUDES = $(gwenhywfar_includes) $(qt3_includes) \
-+INCLUDES = \
-   -I$(top_builddir)/headers \
-   -I$(srcdir)/.. -I$(srcdir)/wizard \
--  -I.. -Iwizard
-+  -I.. -Iwizard \
-+  $(gwenhywfar_includes) $(qt3_includes)
- 
- UI_FILES = \
-  cfgtabpageuserhbci.ui \

src__plugins__backends__aqofxconnect__ui__qt4__libs__Makefile.in

src__plugins__backends__aqofxconnect__ui__qt4__libs__Makefile.in	1969-12-31 
19:00:00.000000000 -0500
+++ aqbanking/files/patch-
src__plugins__backends__aqofxconnect__ui__qt4__libs__Makefile.in	2010-03-06 
19:20:43.000000000 -0500
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- ./src/plugins/backends/aqofxconnect/ui/qt4/libs/Makefile.in.orig	
2010-03-06 16:25:26.000000000 -0500
++++ ./src/plugins/backends/aqofxconnect/ui/qt4/libs/Makefile.in	2010-03-06 
16:26:05.000000000 -0500
+@@ -425,7 +425,7 @@
+   $(aqofxconnect_internal_libs) \
+   $(aqbanking_internal_libs) \
+   $(q4banking_internal_libs) \
+-  $(gwenhywfar_libs) $(qt3_libs)
++  $(gwenhywfar_libs) $(qt4_libs)
+ 
+ MOC_FILES = \
+  cfgtabpageaccountofx.moc \
